description: Massive UI/UX redesign: new charcoal/gold design tokens, redesigned auth flows, updated navigation hubs, chat ecosystem, discovery, economy, settings, plus 20+ brand new feature screens (Wiki, Events, Polls, Q&A, Analytics, AutoMod, Stage, Soundboard, Themes, Bots) — all wired to existing backend APIs.

userStories.title: Update web design tokens (tokens-v2.ts)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the web token system updated so all components inherit the new charcoal/gold visual language.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/web/src/theme/tokens-v2.ts DEFAULT_THEME_V2 tokens
Map semantic/surface/base to #2c2c3e (bg-charcoal)
Map semantic/surface/raised to #353348 (bg-surface)
Map semantic/surface/soft to #413d58 (bg-surface-elevated)
Map semantic/surface/float to #25243a (bg-input)
Map semantic/surface/input to #25243a (bg-input)
Map semantic/text/primary to #e8e4e0, muted to #a8a4b8, faint to #6e6a80
Map semantic/border/default to #4a4660, strong to #4a466080
Map semantic/action/accent to #d4af37 (accent-gold)
Map semantic/action/accent-2 to #e8c547 (gratonite-gold)
Map semantic/status/danger to #e85a6e
Update gradients for purple velvet: bg-purple-velvet #5a4a7a to bg-purple-dark #3e3a5a
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Foundation — every web component reads from these tokens. File: apps/web/src/theme/tokens-v2.ts

userStories.title: Update web CSS variables (:root in styles.css)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the CSS custom properties updated to the new palette so all CSS-based styling reflects the new design.
acceptanceCriteria: Update :root in apps/web/src/styles.css (first ~68 lines)
--bg: #2c2c3e, --bg-elevated: #353348, --bg-soft: #413d58, --bg-float: #25243a, --bg-input: #25243a
--stroke: #4a4660, --stroke-strong: #4a466080
--accent: #d4af37, --accent-2: #e8c547, --accent-3: #6aea8a
--danger: #e85a6e, --danger-bg: rgba(232,90,110,0.12)
--text: #e8e4e0, --text-muted: #a8a4b8, --text-faint: #6e6a80
Update --gradient-primary and --gradient-accent for gold/purple scheme
Add --gold-glow: #d4af3720, --gold-subtle: #d4af3730, --border-gold: #d4af3740
Add --bg-purple-velvet: #5a4a7a, --bg-purple-dark: #3e3a5a
Add --text-on-gold: #1a1a2e, --frosted-glass: #2c2c3e26
Keep font imports for Inter (add if not present), keep sizing/motion/radius vars
Update light mode overrides section to have matching light variants
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Only modify the CSS custom property declarations (:root block), not component styles. File is ~290KB so use offset/limit when reading. Focus on lines 1-120.

userStories.title: Update web AuthLayout with gradient background
userStories.description: As a user, I want the auth pages to have the purple velvet gradient background matching the new designs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/web/src/layouts/AuthLayout.tsx
Add gradient background: linear-gradient from #5a4a7a (top) to #3e3a5a (bottom)
Center the auth card vertically and horizontally with min-height: 100vh
Auth card should use bg-surface (#353348) with border-subtle (#4a4660) border
Card should have border-radius: 16px (radius-lg) and frosted glass effect
Keep existing Outlet, brand logo, and title structure

userStories.title: Create web Events Creation Flow (3-step wizard)

acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/web/src/pages/CreateEventPage.tsx with 3 steps matching .pen nodes vpkXq, 5RM2E, JjC3d
Step 1: Event type selection and channel selection
Step 2: Event details form (title, description, date/time, banner image, location)
Step 3: Preview and confirm with RSVP
Wire to existing events API: POST /guilds/:guildId/scheduled-events
Add route '/guild/:guildId/events/create' to App.tsx
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: NEW PAGE with wizard flow. Read .pen nodes vpkXq, 5RM2E, JjC3d for 3 steps.

userStories.title: Create web Status Menu Popover and User Strip

User strip at bottom: avatar, display name, status text, settings gear icon
Click avatar opens status popover: Online, Idle, DND, Invisible options with colored dots
Custom status text input field in popover
Wire status changes to existing presence API (usersApi.updatePresence)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read .pen nodes 52KO2 and urhDh. Update existing UserBar component.

userStories.title: Create web Confirmation Dialogs and Toast system
